title: FERC Order, Susquehanna ISA / Amazon co-location, Docket ER24-2172-000
why_it_matters: Best public precedent for nuclear plant + data-center co-location risk, tariff ambiguity, and deliverability limits.
memo_sections_supported: Shuffle-style data center nuclear power claim
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by FERC issue section: physical separation, network load, ancillary services, reliability, dissent/concurrence.

title: Constellation Energy 2025 Annual Report
why_it_matters: Key audited public source for Crane/Microsoft PPA, restart assumptions, risks, and capital needs.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by business overview, nuclear restart, customer agreements, liquidity, risk factors.

title: Talen Energy 2025 Annual Report to Shareholders
why_it_matters: Most specific public nuclear-powered data-center offtake benchmark: AWS/Susquehanna quantity, tenor, extension logic.
memo_sections_supported: Shuffle-style data center nuclear power claim
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by PPA/disclosure paragraphs, segment discussion, risks, and data-center/co-location language.

title: DOE LPO Title 17 Overview Deck
why_it_matters: Defines the federal loan-guarantee pathway, underwriting logic, eligibility, and commercialization expectations.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by program authority, eligibility, underwriting, application stages, and repayment test.

title: Final EIS for the Proposed Palisades Nuclear Restart Project
why_it_matters: Core precedent for a nuclear restart moving through DOE NEPA tied to federal financing.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by alternative, environmental resource area, restart scope, mitigation, and DOE findings.

title: DOE Record of Decision for Holtec Palisades Loan Guarantee
why_it_matters: Turns the Palisades restart from policy story into federal decision precedent.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Ingest full; preserve decision language, selected alternative, conditions, and scope limits.

title: DOE FY 2024 Annual Performance Report
why_it_matters: Documents DOE conditional/closed nuclear loan activity including Palisades; useful for bankability scoring.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by LPO/clean-energy financing sections and nuclear project references.

title: Constellation Loan Guarantee Agreement Exhibit for Crane
why_it_matters: Rare public loan-guarantee agreement exhibit with actual legal terms, reimbursement obligations, and scope.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by definitions, conditions precedent, borrower covenants, reimbursement, termination, and project scope.

title: DOE Final HALEU EIS, Volume 1
why_it_matters: Best single public document for integrated HALEU enrichment, deconversion, transport, fabrication, and downstream dependencies.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by supply-chain stage, alternative, facility/pathway, transportation assumption, and impact category.

title: DOE HALEU Allocation Process
why_it_matters: Defines how limited DOE HALEU is allocated; directly constrains customer credibility for advanced reactor timelines.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by pathway, eligibility, prioritization, allocation criteria, and timing dependencies.

title: Centrus Energy 2025 Annual Report
why_it_matters: Audited supplier evidence for HALEU/enrichment credibility, backlog, liquidity, and scale-up risk.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by LEU/HALEU segments, risk factors, backlog, liquidity, DOE contracts, and capex.

title: Centrus Awarded $900 Million to Expand Uranium Enrichment in Ohio
why_it_matters: Major public award/expansion signal for domestic enrichment capacity and contingent utility demand.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk announcement by award size, scope, timing, customer commitments, contingencies, and caveats.

title: Current State of Benchmark Criticality Experiments and Analytical Data to Support Licensing of HALEU Fuel Cycle Facilities
why_it_matters: Shows licensing-critical technical data gaps for HALEU criticality safety across fuel-cycle facilities.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by experiment class, validation gap, fuel form, enrichment range, and licensing implication.

title: High Assay Low Enriched Uranium Transportation Packages
why_it_matters: Direct evidence for whether HALEU logistics claims are credible given package and criticality constraints.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by package type, material form, criticality issue, regulatory gap, and shipping constraint.

title: Centrus American Centrifuge Plant HALEU License Amendment Request
why_it_matters: Concrete NRC licensing basis for HALEU production; anchors supplier claims in regulatory evidence.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by amendment area, safety basis, operating limit, material control, and requested change.

title: Acceptance of the TRISO-X License Application for a Fuel Fabrication Facility
why_it_matters: Reviewability benchmark for TRISO fuel-fabrication facility licensing maturity.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Ingest full; preserve acceptance findings, docketing status, and scope limitations.

title: Final Environmental Impact Statement for the Proposed TRISO-X Fuel Fabrication Facility
why_it_matters: Final environmental review for an advanced fuel-fabrication facility; important deployment bottleneck precedent.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by chapter, resource area, alternatives, mitigation, and staff conclusion.

title: LIC-116, Preapplication Readiness Assessment
why_it_matters: Core rubric for whether an applicant is ready for formal NRC review.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by readiness criterion, process step, applicant/staff role, and assessment output.

title: NuScale Standard Design Certification DCA RAI Report
why_it_matters: Best public question-level RAI benchmark for nuclear application review patterns.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk one RAI per record; preserve question ID, SRP section, branch, status, and response reference.

title: Regulatory Guide 1.233, LMP/RIPB Licensing Basis Methodology
why_it_matters: NRC-endorsed basis for LMP, LBEs, SSC classification, and defense-in-depth review logic.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by endorsed methodology step and NRC clarification.

title: DANU-ISG-2022-01, ARCAP Roadmap Interim Staff Guidance
why_it_matters: Maps advanced reactor application content and review dependencies; backbone for readiness scoring.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by application chapter, roadmap dependency, and applicant/staff guidance.

title: Kemmerer Power Station Unit 1 Final Safety Evaluation
why_it_matters: Most important public commercial non-LWR safety-evaluation benchmark for TerraPower/Natrium deployment claims.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by chapter, finding, condition, open/closed item, and referenced applicant submittal.

title: NUREG-2268 Final EIS for Kemmerer Power Station Unit 1

suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by chapter, environmental resource, mitigation, alternatives, and conclusion.

title: Long Mott Construction Permit Application Part I, General and Financial Information

suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by applicant ownership, financial qualifications, project structure, customer/host references, and assumptions.

title: Georgia PSC Thirtieth Semi-annual Vogtle Construction Monitoring Report
why_it_matters: Best public U.S. construction-monitoring precedent for cost/schedule drift and regulated nuclear buildout.
suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by construction status, schedule, cost, testing, regulatory finding, and variance.

suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by Cumulus/AWS/PPA language, risks, MD&A, and power-market discussion.

suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by business model, customer pipeline, risk factors, liquidity, and fuel strategy.

why_it_matters: Captures unresolved regulatory questions for co-located load, reliability, cost allocation, and jurisdiction.

suggested_chunking_strategy: Chunk by proposal component, eligibility, service model, and unresolved issue.

title: NRC New Fuels Licensing Activities
